title: dendranthema shiwogiku
intro: Dendranthema shiwogiku, also known as Japanese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in Japanese herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating colds and flu, and improving digestion. Dendranthema shiwogiku is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its herbal preparations are commonly used in traditional Japanese medicine to promote overall well-being.
